channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandond Scout Hut, 12th April
item.description:

item.title: Abandoned car, 12th April
item.description:
This car has been abandoned on Frances street for a few days, half in a bay and half on the yellows, smashed front lights graffiti on the bonnet was abandoned on lord warrick street but looks to have been moved and dumped in its current location.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frances Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
